summary: Completed testing Warehouse Fase B (Location/Putaway B1 + Reorder/ROP B2). Backend APIs fully functional (9/9 tests passed). Frontend has critical runtime error preventing LocationPutawayView from rendering - component crashes on load due to undefined property access in zone/rack/bin structure rendering.

minor_issues.impact: Warehouse users cannot perform putaway operations or update location structure
minor_issues.workaround: Use admin user for write operations
minor_issues.recommendation: Add 'update' permission to warehouse role in permissions_config.py line 87

critical_bugs.issue: Runtime error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'code')
critical_bugs.impact: Component crashes on load, preventing entire feature from being usable
critical_bugs.root_cause: Missing null/undefined checks when accessing nested properties (z.name, r.name, l.name, b.code, b.capacity) in zone/rack/level/bin structure rendering
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added defensive null checks (|| '') and (|| []) throughout structure rendering code

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/warehouses/wh_jakarta/locations - returns Zone→Rack→Level→Bin structure with 7 bins, 3500m capacity, 20 unassigned rolls
✅ Backend: PUT /api/warehouses/wh_jakarta/structure - successfully added test zone with racks/levels/bins
✅ Backend: Verify structure persistence - test zone found after re-GET
✅ Backend: GET /api/inventory/putaway/queue - returns 20 rolls waiting for bin assignment
✅ Backend: POST /api/inventory/putaway - successfully assigned roll to bin (queue: 20→19)
✅ Backend: GET /api/purchase-requisitions/reorder-suggestions - returns 6 products below ROP with velocity data (avg_daily_sold, suggested_rop, lead_time)
✅ Backend: SSOT regression check - putaway only updates roll.bin_id, does not modify inventory_balances

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (component crashes on load - critical runtime error)

critical: Fix LocationPutawayView runtime error - component crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading code)'. Applied defensive null checks but needs verification that fix resolves the issue.
Test frontend after fix to verify LocationPutawayView renders correctly and all UI interactions work (tabs, stats cards, structure editing, putaway actions).
medium: Add 'update' permission to warehouse role in /app/backend/permissions_config.py line 87 so warehouse users can perform putaway operations without needing admin privileges.
low: Consider adding error boundary around LocationPutawayView to gracefully handle runtime errors instead of showing red error screen.

backend_api_status.authentication: ✅ Working - both warehouse and admin users can login
backend_api_status.location_crud: ✅ Working - GET locations returns proper structure, PUT structure saves successfully
backend_api_status.putaway_operations: ✅ Working - queue endpoint returns unassigned rolls, putaway action moves rolls to bins
backend_api_status.reorder_suggestions: ✅ Working - returns velocity-based ROP suggestions with all required fields
backend_api_status.ssot_compliance: ✅ Verified - putaway is roll-based, does not directly modify inventory_balances

frontend_status.navigation: ⚠️  BLOCKED - cannot test due to component crash
frontend_status.ui_interactions: ⚠️  BLOCKED - cannot test due to component crash
frontend_status.data_display: ⚠️  BLOCKED - cannot test due to component crash

permission_analysis.issue: warehouse role has 'wms.update' but not 'warehouse.update', causing 403 errors on location structure and putaway endpoints
